title: Creating an Agent's User Interface Description
scenario: Write a short description of a conversational AI agent's user interface that is no more than 25 words. The description should be written in a friendly tone and should include the agent's name and a brief description of its interface.
constraints: Must be no more than 25 words
Must be written in a friendly tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 25-word limit and is written in a friendly tone.
